lines.text: Welcome to WorldCup twenty-six dot world — the game of the world's greatest tournament. Pick three teams. Every match scores. Win the pool.
June eleventh, twenty twenty-six. One hundred thousand voices shake the Estadio Azteca. The World Cup is home — and Mexico opens it against South Africa.

El Tri. Santiago Gimenez leads the line. Hirving Lozano — the man who silenced Germany — waits to strike again. Edson Alvarez anchors the midfield. Guillermo Ochoa — forty years old, six World Cups, ageless. And Orbelin Pineda pulls the strings.
Sixteen years ago, these two nations opened a World Cup together. One, one. The draw that sent Bafana Bafana home — and Mexico onward. Tonight, the ghost of twenty ten returns.

South Africa. Percy Tau — the Lion of Judah. Lyle Foster, forged in Premier League fire. Captain Ronwen Williams guards the goal. Teboho Mokoena dictates the tempo. Evidence Makgopa hunts the breakthrough.
Two nations. One shared memory. Ninety minutes to rewrite it. Don't just watch it — play it. Sign up free at WorldCup twenty-six dot world. Pick your three teams. Win the pool.
